items.summary: Added the canonical `reviewer-clear` definition, made both frozen states require reviewer-clear plus no material pushback, kept `pushback` and `resume_required` available whenever any active reviewer verdict remains `reject`, and extended Step 3 to validate reviewer-status legality semantically.
Defined `round leader` once in <guardrails> and reused that term in arbitration and terminal-resolution logic so the acting authority label stays consistent.
